name_cn:
『Burberry』
Burberry's soft yet structured camera bag, crafted from vintage heritage check fabric with Italian tanned leather trim. Can be worn on the shoulder or adjusted for a crossbody style.
Dimensions: 23 x 4.7 x 13cm
